Who we are

Our company overview

Climate Arc Global Limited supports organizations, communities, and public institutions to design and implement high-impact, climate-resilient and nature-positive interventions.

The firm operates at the interface of climate adaptation, sustainable food systems, biodiversity conservation, and environmental governance — translating global policy priorities into practical, locally grounded solutions.

Our vision

A climate-resilient, restored, and sustainably managed environment for communities, institutions, and ecosystems.

Our mission

To deliver evidence-based advisory and implementation services that strengthen climate adaptation, biodiversity restoration, and sustainable development practices, while enhancing the resilience of people, institutions, and ecosystems.

How we work

Evidence-led. Participatory. Scalable.

Our approach

We apply an evidence-led, participatory approach that combines technical analysis with inclusive dialogue among stakeholders. Ecosystem restoration and nature-based solutions are integrated across all assignments, with a focus on scalable models that can be replicated and expanded in different contexts.

Why choose us

We bring together strong technical expertise in climate, biodiversity, and sustainability with hands-on experience in programme design, delivery, and resource mobilization. Our work is characterized by rigorous analysis, inclusive processes, and a deliberate emphasis on gender, youth, and community leadership — ensuring interventions are both impactful and equitable.

What we do

Our core service offering

School greening & Climate-Smart Schools programming
Country-level partnerships & implementation support
Community-based project design & capacity building
Climate change adaptation & mitigation planning
Waste management & circular economy solutions
Biodiversity conservation & restoration planning
Renewable energy & energy efficiency advisory
Sustainability strategy for companies & NGOs
Gender & youth responsive programming
Grant writing & resource mobilization
Who we serve
County & national government entities International & local NGOs and foundations Community-based & grassroots organizations Development partners & multi-donor initiatives Corporate sustainability & CSR teams Educational institutions & research organizations
Where we've been

Engagements & highlights

From classrooms in Kenya to negotiation rooms at UNFCCC sessions — our work spans grassroots delivery and global advocacy.

Founder's profile

Cherono Sharon

Founder & Lead Consultant

Cherono has over six years of progressive experience in climate change adaptation, sustainable agriculture, and restoration programming, with demonstrated capacity to lead complex, multi-stakeholder initiatives from design through implementation and reporting.

She has led donor-funded restoration and climate resilience projects with organizations such as the Kenya National Farmers' Federation (KENAFF) and the African Centre for Environment, Energy and Climate Advocacy (ACEECA), and currently supports global advocacy and fundraising at the TAPP Coalition.

  • Coordinated the Farm Forestry, Afforestation & Biodiversity Conservation Programme, youth-focused nursery initiatives, and women-led agriculture and restoration projects
  • Contributed to winning proposals for IKI, GIZ, FAO, and the G20 Global Land Initiative
  • Represented civil society and farmer constituencies at UNFCCC sessions, COPs, the UN Food Systems Summit, and the Oslo Tropical Forest Forum

Let's build resilience together

Planning a climate, restoration, or sustainability initiative? We'd love to hear about it.
